2026-04-24T22:40:31.7953163Z ##[group]Run # Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct
2026-04-24T22:40:31.7954273Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-24T22:40:31.7955331Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-24T22:40:31.7956160Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
2026-04-24T22:40:31.7956799Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GH_HOST#http://}"[0m
2026-04-24T22:40:31.7957474Z [36;1mecho "GH_HOST=${GH_HOST}" >> "$GITHUB_ENV"[0m
2026-04-24T22:40:31.7964072Z shell: /usr/bin/bash --noprofile --norc -e -o pipefail {0}
